sourcesContent:
import { Component } from '@angular/core'; @Component({ selector: 'app-cv', templateUrl: './cv.component.html', styleUrls: ['./cv.component.scss'] }) export class CvComponent { activeTab: 'software' | 'support' = 'software'; setTab(tab: 'software' | 'support') { this.activeTab = tab; } }
curl -O cv.pdf

CV

View CV Download PDF

Profile

Final-year BSc IT student (Security & Network Engineering) with a Higher Certificate in Software Development, seeking to grow as a Graduate Software Engineer. Hands-on experience building web applications using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, jQuery, and SQL, complemented by academic exposure to C#/.NET, Angular, and ASP.NET Core. Passionate about clean code, continuous learning, and delivering software that makes a real difference.

Technical Skills

HTML / CSS / JSjQuery C# / .NETSQL AngularASP.NET Core Git / Version ControlAzure (Exposure)

Education

BSc IT — Security & Network Engineering — Eduvos, Cape Town (Feb 2025 – Present, final year)

Higher Certificate in Software Development — Eduvos, Cape Town (Feb 2022 – Mar 2023)

Experience

Employability & Academics Member — SRC — Eduvos, Cape Town (Dec 2024 – Present)

Receptionist — SOCEARUCO, Kinshasa, D.R. Congo (Jan 2020 – Apr 2021)

Profile

Final-year BSc IT student (Security & Network Engineering) at Eduvos, with a Higher Certificate in Software Development. Passionate about how the Internet works — from DNS and SSL/TLS to HTTP and network layer protocols. Hands-on experience in Linux, scripting, and building web applications. Eager to bring technical curiosity and strong communication skills to a team helping build a better Internet.

Technical Skills

Linux / CLIPython / Bash JavaScriptHTML / CSS DNS / SSL / HTTPGit SQLNetworking (OSI)

Relevant Technical Knowledge

Networking & Protocols: OSI model (Layers 3, 4 & 7); DNS, SSL/TLS, HTTP/HTTPS, TCP/IP.

Linux & CLI Tools: curl, dig, traceroute, openssl, git for troubleshooting tasks.

Web Servers: Awareness of Apache and Nginx; configured basic server environments academically.

Experience

Employability & Academics Member — SRC — Eduvos, Cape Town (Dec 2024 – Present)

Receptionist — SOCEARUCO, Kinshasa, D.R. Congo (Jan 2020 – Apr 2021)
